steps.title: Grow an overnight bacterial culture in...
steps.instruction: Grow an overnight bacterial culture in the appropriate media at an appropriate temperature.

steps.title: In the following day, take 1...
steps.instruction: In the following day, take 1 mL from overnight culture and add into 10 mL LB media. Grow until the OD600 reads at 0.6-1.0.

steps.title: Harvest 1
steps.instruction: Harvest 1.5 mL culture (< 5x10%) by centrifugation at 3.000 rpm, , 10 minutes for 10 min in a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Discard all supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard all supernatant. You may use a pipette to remove the remaining liquid at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 100 µL freshly prepared Elution Buffer (10mM Tris-HCL pH 8.5) containing lysozyme (0.4 mg/mL lysozyme for Gram negative bacteria). Mix by tapping gently.

steps.title: Incubate the resuspended pellet at room...
steps.instruction: Incubate the resuspended pellet at room temperature for 3-5 min for Gram-negative bacteria.

steps.title: Add 400 μL Buffer LY
steps.instruction: Add 400 μL Buffer LY. Mix gently.

steps.title: Transfer the cleared lysate to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the cleared lysate to a DNA Clearance column pre-inserted in a 2 mL Collection Tube. Centrifuge at 13.000 rpm, , 2 minutes . Discard the DNA Clearance column and save the flow-through.

steps.title: Transfer flow-through to the RNA binding column
steps.instruction: Transfer flow-through to the RNA binding column. Add 0.5 volume 100% ethanol to the lysate. For example: 250 μL 100% ethanol for 500 μL.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 rpm, , 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 rpm, , 1 minute . Discard the collection tube with the flow through and put the column back to a new collection tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Buffer RB to...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Buffer RB to the column and centrifuge at 13.000 rpm, , 30 seconds . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add another 500 µL RNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add another 500 µL RNA Wash Buffer to the column and centrifuge at 13000 rpm, , 30 seconds . Discard the flow-through. Ethanol should be first added into RNA Wash Buffer before use.

steps.title: Add another 500 µL RNA Wash...
steps.instruction: Add another 500 µL RNA Wash Buffer to the column and centrifuge at 13000 rpm, , 30 seconds . Discard the flow-through and collection tube, put the column into a new collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge the column at 13000 rpm,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the column at 13000 rpm, , , with the lid open, for another 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Place the column to a RNase-free 1
steps.instruction: Place the column to a RNase-free 1.5 mL tube, add 50-100 μL DEPC treated ddH 2 O to the column and centrifuge at 13000 rpm, , 2 minutes . The RNA is in the flow-through.
